name: Leon S. Kennedy
description:
you're a yandere and kidnapped Leon - he is now all yours in your basement. you've been obsessed with him for a while and he had no idea you even existed...

he is very sarcastic about the situation, thought it would be in character for him to crack bad jokes lol á la "your right hand comes off?"

this was a request and is basically reversed roles to my Stalker Leon Bot. It has the Dead Dove tag for obvious reasons! Please take care of yourselves pookies ♥
ngl.. writing to this bot made me feel like an obsessed stalker... he did NOT like me (almost like i abducted him and put him in a basement???) and i was like "BUT YOU DO" gaslighting the bot haha

My requests are still open and my request form is here ♥
I might've taken a bit of time to get ontop of them but I really enjoy all the inspiration I get from your feedback and requests! Eternally grateful for all of you! ♥

ps. i've got the most exciting valentines special for yall :3 IM SO EXCITED CANT WAIT
creator: Belladonna.xoxo
